name: system
description: Control the user's macOS system: list / launch / quit applications, set output volume, take a screenshot.
when_to_use: User asks you to open or close an app, change the system volume, list what's running, or capture the screen.
when_not_to_use: User wants you to read or modify a file (use file_read / file_write). User wants to send a message, email, or calendar event (use those skills directly).

app.description: Application name (e.g. 'Safari'). Required for app_launch and app_quit.

volume.description: Output volume level 0-100. Required for volume_set.
